cases.description: Single fix baseline — NO set_todos, single request_fix.

turns.user: Open a fix for the highest-severity reachable CVE in my org.

cases.description: Multi-fix create → multi-revise → second-revise (combines dogfood prompts 2/3/4 into one chat).

turns.user: Open fix plans for the top 3 highest-severity reachable CVEs in my org.
Revise all three plans to add unit tests.
Now revise each of them to add longer issue descriptions.

cases.description: Negative test — no set_todos for chained read-only tool calls.

turns.user: Show me my security posture, list my top 5 projects, and recommend an action.

cases.description: Cross-turn idempotency — repeating the same request_fix on turn 2 should hit the dedup hint, not insert a duplicate row.

turns.user: Open a fix for the highest-severity reachable CVE in my org.

cases.description: Duplicate-revise stress — agent should call revise_fix once with combined instructions, OR twice with the second hitting the dedup guard.

turns.user: Open a fix for the highest-severity reachable CVE in my org.
Revise the Log4j plan to add tests, and also revise the Log4j plan to mention the CVSS score.

cases.description: Stable-id matcher — even when summary has drifted, substring 'commons-text' should match because the matcher checks fileChanges paths + osv_id.

turns.user: Open a fix plan for CVE-2022-42889 (commons-text) in deptex-test-java.
Revise the commons-text plan to add unit tests.
